programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Neil Stuke and Penny Smith hit the road with £400, shopping in Herefordshire with help from Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant and diversions to a cider museum and puppetry archive. At the auction in Newport, Shropshire, who will win the day?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Laila Rouass and Charles Dale battle their way around the north of England for eccentric antiques they hope will turn a profit. James Lewis and Paul Laidlaw are there to help as they travel from York via Leeds to auction in Chertsey.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: John Barrowman and Myleene Klass, with David Barby and David Harper, hunt for antiques to turn a profit. On the way, they visit Bristol, Chepstow, Newport and Cardiff before winding up at auction in Froncysylite by the Welsh-English border.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper and David Barby help out former gold medalists Robin Cousins and Tessa Sanderson, ready to hit the road with £400. From Bury St Edmonds, with stops at the Whipple Museum and the Fan Museum, who will win the day in Greenwich?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Fern Britton and Phil Vickery take a trip around Devon with Mark Stacey and James Braxton. The teams hunt treasures to make a profit in Crewkerne, Somerset, Fern learns more about Agatha Christie and Phil gets basic with bread making.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Pairs from different nations face off in a fun international Bullseye Challenge.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Full session replay of Series 11: Week 9, Finals Night.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bentwaters UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Dungeons & Dragons and I.D. Swap & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: SADD Fugitive, Nazca Lines, Where's Charlotte? and The Entity.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: G.I. Guinea Pig, Bank Tunnel, Murder in the Park, Noreen Renier and Unknown Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bad Chief, Locust Grove, Update: Pizza Man and Perpetual Partners.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Son of Sam, 48-Hour Fraud, Twisted Sisters, Update: Train Wreck Amnesia and Miracle Staircase.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Streets
programme.desc: Hidden underground for years in Keighley West Yorkshire. Ghost Dimension investigate haunted Victorian Streets, used during the war as bombing shelters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Crooked House
programme.desc: Deep in Cheshire Ghost Dimension explore a house full of ghostly activity and paranormal goings on. Used to house troops during WW2 as a medical unit.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker in Nantwich. Something sinister and paranormal seems to be causing havoc inside of the building and tonight it unleashes powerful activity

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Prisoner of War
programme.desc: Barrow Green H17 Anti-Aircraft Battery build to protect the Liverpool Docks and general area and a former prisoner of war camp, holds some sinister secrets and Ghost Dimension uncover paranormal activity dating back to WW2. What will be caught tonight?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Family of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Princess and the EVP
programme.desc: The final day has arrived –it's Grant's last investigation with TAPS. And where better to close out his phenomenal run but at Jason and Grant's very own haunted property, Spalding Inn, located in Whitefield, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Please Sign the Ghostbook
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS stays close to home and investigatesthe Lamda Chi Fraternity House at the University ofRhode Island, where a little girl reportedly fell to her death, and whose eerie presence is still feltin the house.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Serial Killer's Revenge
programme.desc: Jason and the TAPS team head to Charleston, South Carolina, one of the most haunted cities in America and winner of Ghost Hunters America's Hometown Ghost Hunt Contest.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Todmoredon Church
programme.desc: For the first time Yvette takes her fearless Most Haunted team to an ordained church and graveyard. But it’s the cellar that proves the most fearful as the team get caught in a small room and they are not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Weir Mill
programme.desc: Yvette take her team to an abandoned mill where spirits are said to roam and satanic ritual taken place. What awaits them is an evening of fear that causes one of the team to leave early.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ripon Workhouse
programme.desc: In a place where the homeless were kept and work was hard, death was often the only escape but it seems that wasn’t the way for some as their souls are said to roam this place.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Ripon Prison
programme.desc: A small prison in Yorkshire gives a big impact when Yvette and her team attempt to stay the night. Although many inmates were released some are still locked up and they are not happy.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Standon Hall Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on a three-part investigation that tests them to the very core. A place that surprised intrigued and terrified the hardened team, making Standon Hall the most fearful place they have investigated.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Witness to Murder, Roulette Wheel, The Phrenologist's Head, The Bridge, The Cigar Box.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: One for the Road, The Music Box, Two to One, Damsel, The Horn.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Prophecy, Couch Potato, Love Over the Counter, Imaginary Friend, Last Man on Earth.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bright Light, Magic Mightyman, The Student, Scribbles, Count Mystery.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Rock and Roll Ears, The Bucket, The Bridesmaid, Voice from the Grave, The Chess Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Second Sight, The Fine Line, The Wrong Turn, Who Was I, You Are Next.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Calling
programme.desc: Rebecca hears spirits but is able to ignore them until one emerges who refuses to be ignored.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Apartment
programme.desc: The Spencer’s move to a new apartment that is loud with spirits.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After James Hilton and his girlfriend Sandy bring an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted. Sandy fears the entity from the cabinet is taking James over and turns to paranormal investigators for aid.
